prompt: Create a highly realistic vertical courtside audience photo of a beautiful young Asian woman watching an NBA playoff game from the stands, framed waist-up in a close closeup. She sits among packed Golden State Warriors fans inside a vibrant basketball arena, looking slightly upward and off-camera with a surprised open-mouth reaction as if witnessing a dramatic play. She has a messy high bun with loose face-framing strands, glossy dark hair, bold winged eyeliner, long lashes, peach blush, soft peach lipstick, smooth luminous skin, and large gold hoop earrings. Dress her in a fitted royal-blue Golden State Warriors zip-up jacket with yellow zipper, yellow-and-white shoulder panels, ribbed collar stripes, and a clear Warriors bridge logo patch on the chest. The background should be sharp and detailed, crowded with fans in blue and gold Warriors gear: foam fingers raised, baseball caps, jerseys, arena ribbon boards, bright stadium lights, drink bottles, and rows of seats, creating playoff energy without blurring away the environment. Use natural arena lighting, documentary sports photography realism, crisp facial detail, shallow-to-moderate depth of field, vivid blue and gold color palette, vertical 2:3 composition, no watermark, no URL, no distorted hands or extra facial features.
